antalikkhe.meaning: in the sky, in the air; celestial
breakdown: Interval, in between (becoming antali- in the compound).

antara.meaning: within, across, beyond; interval, in between

antaradhāyati.gram: verb, 3rd person singular present, compound verb

antarahito.gram: past participle of antaradhāyati, masculine nominative singular

antaritattā.meaning: because of being hidden or concealed
breakdown: Abstract suffix in the ablative, "because of the state of".

antarā.meaning: in between; meanwhile, on the way

antarā + antarā.meaning: in between, from time to time

antarāpaccatthikā.meaning: hidden enemies; opponents within (enemies in the guise of friends)
breakdown: Negative element in the lexicon's analysis ("not [openly] an opponent").
antarāpaccatthikā.note: uncertain: the lexicon analyses this as antara + a + paccatthikā, "inner + not + opponent" — an enemy who does not appear as one; DPD reads simply antarā + paccatthika, "hidden enemy".

antarāsapattā.meaning: hidden rivals; foes within (rivals in the guise of friends)
breakdown: Negative element in the lexicon's analysis ("not [openly] a rival").
antarāsapattā.note: uncertain: the lexicon analyses this as antara + a + sapattā, "inner + not + rival"; DPD reads antarā + sapatta, "hidden foe".

antarāvadhakā.meaning: hidden murderers; killers within (murderers in the guise of friends)
breakdown: Negative element in the lexicon's analysis ("not [openly] a killer").
antarāvadhakā.note: uncertain: the lexicon analyses this as antara + a + vadhakā, "inner + not + killer"; DPD reads antarā + vadhaka, "hidden murderer".

antavā.meaning: finite, having an end (opposite: anantavā, infinite)

antevāsikavāso.meaning: living as a pupil; the state of one dwelling with a teacher

antevāsinā.gram: masculine agent noun antevāsī, instrumental singular
breakdown: Dweller (√vas); a pupil dwelling with the teacher.

antobhājane.meaning: inside the vessel, within the pot
antobhājane.gram: neuter noun, locative singular with prefix anto-

antoparisoko.meaning: inner severe grief; deep mourning within
antoparisoko.gram: masculine abstract compound noun, nominative singular

antosoko.gram: masculine abstract compound noun, nominative singular

anubandhanavasena.meaning: on account of what follows; by way of pursuing
anubandhanavasena.gram: compound noun, instrumental singular used adverbially
breakdown: On account of, by way of (instrumental of vasa "power, influence").

anubodhañāṇaṁ.meaning: knowledge of understanding; knowledge arising from perception and comprehension

anucchavikattā.meaning: because of suitability; the state of being fit, proper, worthy
breakdown: Abstract suffix in the ablative, "because of the state of".

anuddayataṁ.gram: feminine abstract noun anuddayatā, accusative singular

anuddhatā.gram: past participle of na uddhata, plural or feminine form

anudhammacārino.meaning: walking in accordance with the Dhamma; acting in conformity with the teaching
anudhammacārino.gram: adjective, compound, plural or genitive singular
breakdown: The teaching, the law of nature.

anuggāhakā.meaning: patronising, helping, fostering; one who supports

anugāmika.meaning: accompanying; resulting from, following (one to the next world)

anugāmin.meaning: following, attending to, going along with

anujānāmi.meaning: I consent to, I grant, I allow
anujānāmi.gram: verb, 1st person singular present of anujānāti (anu + √ñā)
breakdown: Root "to know" (stem jānā-); anujānāti = "to permit, grant".

anulomaṁ.meaning: in natural order; with the grain
breakdown: Hair of the body; anuloma = "with the hair", in natural order.

anulometi.meaning: to correspond to, to be in accordance with
anulometi.gram: verb, 3rd person singular present (denominative of anuloma)

anunnatena.meaning: not exalted, not haughty; with an unconceited (mind)
anunnatena.gram: past participle of na unnamati, instrumental singular

anupadajjeyyāsi.meaning: you should support, encourage; you should hand over
anupadajjeyyāsi.gram: verb, 2nd person singular optative of anuppadeti (irregular)

anupaddave.gram: adjective, locative singular or plural form

anupagamma.meaning: not going to, not resorting to; not to be followed

anupaggamma.meaning: not succumbing, not going over to
anupaggamma.gram: gerund of na upagacchati (with gg doubling)

anupahacca.meaning: not spoiling, not hurting, not impairing

anuparidhāvanti.meaning: they run around following, they circle round after
anuparidhāvanti.gram: verb, 3rd person plural present of anuparidhāvati

anuparivattanti.meaning: they revolve following, they keep turning around after
anuparivattanti.gram: verb, 3rd person plural present of anuparivattati

anuppadassāmīti.meaning: "I will give out, I will hand over" (with quotation marker ti)
anuppadassāmīti.gram: verb, 1st person singular future of anuppadeti + quotation particle ti
breakdown: Future ending, 1st person singular (lengthened before ti).

anuppadetu.gram: verb, 3rd person singular imperative of anuppadeti

anuppannā.meaning: not arisen, not yet come into being
anuppannā.gram: past participle of na uppajjati, plural or feminine form
